summary: Severe rate limiting on GET /api/projects during load test
short_description: Load test generated sustained HTTP 429 responses on the unauthorized projects endpoint.

evidence.error_signature: Expected 401 but got 429: Too many requests, please try again later.

timeline.event: Failure rate starts rising above baseline
Failure rate peaks in early saturation window

recommended_actions: Review API gateway/auth middleware rate-limit policy for unauthorized requests.
Split 401 and 429 handling paths to preserve expected security semantics.
Add dedicated alert on sudden 429 spike for auth-protected endpoints.
